Item.name: Coalition Ration
Item.description: A common ration made and distributed by the Coalition. Contains a bulk of nutrients recommended for a sailor's life.

Vodka.name: Cossacks Vodka
Vodka.description: Just like they made it back in the Zone.

Item.name: Medkit
Item.description: Contains five syringes filled with copious amounts of opiates and adrenaline. Will keep you alive in a fight, provided you don't overdose.

Item.name: Party Poppers
Item.description: Submarine life cutting you up and breaking you down? Not anymore with a visit to the doctors for one of these bad boys. Note: This product may induce cardiac instability, consult your crew's doctor to determine if this medication is right for you.

Item.name: Opium Cigar
Item.description: A fine hand-crafted cigar, made from aquatic poppy. It burns longer than your average cigar, and still smells of the ocean. Due to it's potency, it is quite addictive.

Item.name: Cigar Bag
Item.description: A Refitted Seed bag, now used for comfortably storing hand crafted cigars. Doesn't fit your normal tobacco based cigar, though.

Item.name: Emergency Hand-Operated Generator
Item.description: A bulky, yet extremely useful hand-operated combination flashlight and battery cell charger. It is capable of generating light via manual crank power for an almost indefinite period of time thanks to its highly effecient lightbulb, and it's charger can simultaneously provide charge to cells, so long as they still have a residual battery life and are not completely drained.

Item.name: .50 BMG Ratshot Round
Item.description: .50 BMG Rat-Shot ammo, more akin to a flak shell than a bullet, originally designed for killing unusually large rodents. Anything without armor will assuredly die, and anything with it will regret crossing you.

Item.name: Rocket Launcher
Item.description: A portable rocket launcher for 4in rockets.

Item.name: Rocket Launcher
Item.description: A portable rocket launcher for 4in rockets.
